notableEvents.label: Jorge Soler plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Soler hit by pitch. Bryce Teodosio scores. Zach Neto to 3rd. Vaughn Grissom to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jo Adell plunked
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell hit by pitch. Zach Neto scores. Vaughn Grissom to 3rd. Jorge Soler to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Oswald Peraza GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza grounds into a double play, second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami to shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Jorge Soler out at 2nd. Oswald Peraza out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Andrew Benintendi GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andrew Benintendi grounds into a double play, second baseman Vaughn Grissom to shortstop Zach Neto to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Chase Meidroth out at 2nd. Andrew Benintendi out at 1st.
